definition: to stay in the same place or condition
examples: Please remain calm during the test.
Several questions remain unanswered.
The shop will remain closed until Monday.

definition: to find an answer to a problem
examples: Can you solve this puzzle?
We need to solve the problem quickly.
The update solved several issues.

definition: to act in a particular way
examples: Children should behave politely in public.
The machine is behaving normally.
He behaved calmly during the argument.

definition: to communicate with someone by phone, message, or email
sentence: Please _____ me if you need help.
examples: Please contact me if you need help.
The company contacted me about the interview.
Contact customer support by email.

definition: to speak or write about something briefly
sentence: He did not _____ the problem during the meeting.
examples: He did not mention the problem.
She mentioned your name.
I forgot to mention one detail.

definition: to know someone or something because you have seen it before
sentence: I did not _____ him at first.
examples: I did not recognise him at first.
She recognised the song immediately.
It is important to recognise your mistakes.

definition: to move closer to someone or something
sentence: We watched the train _____ the platform.
examples: We watched the train approach the platform.
She approached the problem carefully.
A stranger approached me in the street.

definition: to keep something in good condition or at the same level
sentence: It is important to _____ a healthy routine.
examples: It is important to maintain a healthy routine.
The company maintains high standards.
Regular service helps maintain the machine.

definition: to give someone confidence or support
sentence: Good teachers _____ students to ask questions.
examples: Good teachers encourage students to ask questions.
Her friends encouraged her to apply.
The program encourages regular practice.

definition: to answer someone or react to something
examples: Please respond to the email today.
He did not respond to my question.
The system responds quickly.

definition: to include someone or something as part of an activity
examples: The project will involve several teams.
The job involves working with customers.
The change may involve some risk.

definition: to change your behaviour or ideas to suit a new situation
sentence: It can take time to _____ to a new city.
examples: It can take time to adapt to a new city.
Businesses must adapt to change.
She adapted the plan to fit the budget.

definition: able to be trusted or depended on
sentence: We need a _____ source of information.
examples: We need a reliable source of information.
This car is old but reliable.
She is a reliable team member.

definition: easy to use or suitable for a particular situation
sentence: Online banking is very _____ for many people.
examples: Online banking is very convenient.
Is Friday convenient for you?
The hotel is in a convenient location.

definition: a difficult task that tests someone's ability
sentence: Learning a new language can be a _____.
examples: Learning a new language can be a challenge.
The team accepted the challenge.
Finding time is my biggest challenge.

definition: a situation that makes it possible to do something useful
sentence: This course is a good _____ to practise speaking.
examples: This course is a good opportunity to practise speaking.
She had the opportunity to work abroad.
Do not miss this opportunity.

definition: working well without wasting time or resources
examples: This new system is more efficient.
She found a more efficient way to work.
Public transport can be efficient in large cities.
